prompt: Create an entity called 'UserModel' with observations: 'has fields: id, name, email' and 'uses PostgreSQL for persistence'. Now rename this entity to 'AccountModel'. There is NO rename tool available — you will need to: (1) create a new entity called 'AccountModel', (2) add the same observations to it, (3) delete the old 'UserModel' entity. After all steps, open_nodes for 'AccountModel' to verify it has both observations, and search_nodes for 'UserModel' to verify it no longer exists.
rationale: Tests ambiguous intent — no rename tool exists, agent must synthesize the operation from create+add+delete
